title: Contact Keir Starmer - MP for Holborn and St Pancras and Labour Leader
meta_description: Keir Starmer is a husband, father, and former lawyer who has fought for fairness his whole working life. He is now Labour Party leader.
text_excerpt: Contact Keir Starmer - MP for Holborn and St Pancras and Labour Leader Skip to content Keir Starmer Prime Minister of the United Kingdom Leader of the Labour Party MP for Holborn and St Pancras Home About Holborn and St Pancras Contact Home About Holborn and St Pancras Contact Contact Keir If you would like to get in touch with Keir in his capacity as Prime Minister, please fill out the form located at the bottom of this Gov.uk web page . For queries relating to Labour Party matters, please visit the Labour Party website . If you are a constituent of Holborn & St Pancras, please email us on [email protected] Due to Parliamentary protocol, please ensure you have included your full name and postal address within the constituency or you may not receive a response. If you are not a constituent, you can find your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/members/commons Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of Keir Starmer, 20 Rushworth Street London SE1 0SS Facebook Youtube Instagram Privacy Policy Cookies The Labour Party Privacy Policy Cookies The Labour Party To understand how we use cookies please see our Cookie policy . By choosing 'Reject' we will only use the necessary cookies to make our site work. ACCEPT REJECT Privacy & Cookies Policy Close Privacy Overview This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these cookies, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website. These cookies will be stored in your browser only with your consent. You also have the option to opt-out of these cookies. But opting out of some of these cookies may have an effect on your browsing experience. Necessary Necessary Always Enabled Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information. Non-necessary Non-necessary Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website. SAVE & ACCEPT
